key.name: toggle-picker
key.description: Keyboard accelerator used to open Topbar Snips and focus the search field.

key.name: copy-on-activate
key.summary: Keep snippet in clipboard after activation
key.description: Whether activating a snippet should keep the snippet text in the clipboard after attempting automatic paste.

key.name: show-notifications
key.description: Whether snippet activation, deletion, file opening, and paste failure should show desktop notifications.

key.name: developer-mode
key.description: Whether to expose developer-only options for working with bundled snippets during extension development.

key.name: use-bundled-snippets
key.summary: Read bundled snippets.txt instead of snippets.local.txt
key.description: Whether the picker should read the bundled snippets.txt file instead of the user-specific snippets.local.txt file. This option is meant for development and testing.
